notes: Initial Ralph execution batch covering Milestones 0-3 foundations.

features.description: Add request correlation id filter and expose trace id in API responses
steps: Create CorrelationId value object under shared module
Add request filter/interceptor to set correlation id per request
Attach correlation id to response headers
Ensure logs include correlation id via MDC
Cover behavior with unit/integration tests

features.description: Standardize API error contract with code message and traceId
steps: Create ApiError DTO and error code model
Implement global exception handler
Map domain and validation exceptions to stable codes
Return traceId in all error responses
Add tests for error response shape

features.description: Implement user registration endpoint with password hashing
steps: Define User entity and repository contract
Add registration request/response DTOs
Integrate PasswordHasher service using bcrypt or argon2
Create POST register endpoint
Persist user with hashed password only
Add registration tests

features.description: Implement login endpoint returning JWT/session token
steps: Add authentication request and response contracts
Implement credential verification against password hash
Issue signed JWT/session token
Handle invalid credentials with stable error
Add login tests

features.description: Implement role model and authorization guard helpers
steps: Define Role value object/types
Add AuthorizationService with ownership and role checks
Protect admin endpoints
Add basic ownership guard wiring for wallet/transaction resources
Add tests for allowed and denied paths

features.description: Add Money and Currency value objects using minor units
steps: Create Currency value object with strict code validation
Create Money value object using integer minor units
Implement safe arithmetic for same-currency operations
Reject currency mismatch operations
Add focused unit tests

features.description: Create append-only double-entry ledger transaction writer
steps: Define ledger entities for account transaction and entry
Implement write path that enforces per-currency zero-sum
Persist transaction and entries atomically
Prevent entry mutation after creation
Add concurrency and invariant tests

features.description: Provision wallet and platform accounts for new users
steps: Create WalletProvisioningService
Provision user wallet plus internal clearing and fee accounts
Make provisioning idempotent
Wire provisioning on user creation event/path
Add provisioning tests

features.description: Add balance query endpoint with paginated transaction history
steps: Build balance projection/query service
Add balance endpoint returning available values
Add paginated transaction history endpoint
Support date range type and status filters
Add API tests

features.description: Implement payment state machine with guarded transitions
steps: Create Payment entity and PaymentStatus model
Implement centralized PaymentStateMachine
Enforce allowed transition graph
Return meaningful domain errors for invalid transitions
Add state machine tests

features.description: Align transaction persistence with Money minor-units model
steps: Replace BigDecimal amount fields with integer minor units in transaction persistence models
Validate and normalize currency code handling
Update Postgres and Mongo mappers to keep parity
Create and apply schema migration for amount column changes
Update and run persistence and integration tests

features.description: Enforce append-only financial records and remove hard-delete behavior
steps: Remove or restrict DELETE transaction endpoint to non-production admin-only path
Represent cancellation as allowed state transition instead of row deletion
Block mutation of settled/completed financial records
Emit audit log entries for privileged maintenance actions
Add API tests proving immutability guarantees

features.description: Create authentication UI scaffold for registration and login
steps: Create login and registration pages/components in frontend
Implement auth service and store for session/token state
Integrate register and login API calls with error handling
Protect authenticated routes and redirect unauthenticated users
Add frontend component/service tests

features.description: Create admin panel UI scaffold for system status and basic admin views
steps: Add admin route guarded by admin role checks
Render backend admin status endpoint output
Create initial admin dashboard layout for users and payments
Add admin API client service
Add frontend tests for role guard and admin status rendering

features.description: Create wallet balance and transaction history frontend view
steps: Build wallet dashboard UI for available, pending, and held balances
Build paginated transaction history table with filters
Add wallet service methods for balance and history endpoints
Add currency formatting from minor units for display
Add frontend tests for dashboard and filtering behavior

features.description: Create P2P send money frontend flow scaffold
steps: Create send-money form and confirmation UI
Add recipient lookup and validation behavior
Integrate payment submission service call
Show success and failure states with actionable messages
Add frontend tests for submit and validation flow

features.description: Add multi-currency wallet support
steps: Support one wallet ledger account per currency
Enforce same-currency operations by default
Add mocked FX conversion path for allowed cross-currency transfers
Update balance responses to group totals per currency
Add migration and tests for multi-currency account scenarios

features.description: Implement CQRS materialized balance projection
steps: Define BalanceProjection read model
Update projection via domain events emitted from ledger writes
Add projection rebuild command from ledger history
Switch balance query path to projection with fallback behavior
Add projection consistency and rebuild tests

features.description: Implement event sourcing mode for payment aggregate
steps: Define payment domain event set
Create append-only payment event store
Reconstruct payment aggregate state from event stream
Optionally add snapshot optimization
Add deterministic replay tests

features.description: Add scheduled and recurring payments
steps: Create ScheduledPayment model and recurrence rule types
Build scheduler job for due payment execution
Integrate due executions with payment flow
Add cancellation and retry behavior
Add scheduler and recurrence tests

features.description: Add Redis cache layer for balance projections
steps: Create balance cache service and key strategy
Update cache on ledger write events
Read balance from cache with fallback to source of truth
Add cache warm/rebuild process
Add cache hit/miss and fallback tests

features.description: Introduce async event bus via Kafka or RabbitMQ
steps: Define event publisher port and broker adapters
Publish outbox/domain events to broker topics or exchanges
Wire consumer handlers for notifications, webhooks, and projections
Enforce idempotent consumption semantics
Add broker integration tests

features.description: Add merchant subscription billing
steps: Create subscription plan and subscription models
Add plan creation and subscribe APIs
Run billing-cycle executions via scheduler
Add dunning and cancellation behavior
Add subscription billing tests
